sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try moving the blue rectangle RIGHT and DOWN to see if it can reach the magenta block or the yellow shapes.
# Current position: row 36-39, col 12-31.
# Magenta block: row 4-7, col 36-39.
# Yellow shapes: row 52-59, col 16-27 and 40-51.

# Let's try moving RIGHT 5 times and DOWN 4 times.
action(['RIGHT'] * 5 + ['DOWN'] * 4)

# Check new position.
seg = current_frame.segmentation
blue_rect = next((n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b'), None)
print(f"Blue rect position: {blue_rect['boundary'] if blue_rect else 'Not found'}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
